name: ecp
description: E-commerce conversion-psychology audit for a single ecommerce page from a URL. Evidence-tiered findings (Gold/Silver/Bronze) across pricing, trust, SEO, mobile, performance, visual design, content, and checkout; a prioritized Priority Path; and an annotated visual report with an editable hotspot tool. Three-state ethics gate (BLOCK/ADJACENT/CLEAR). Command: /ecp:audit. Canonical scope: product.md. Platform-aware detection (Shopify, Next.js, OpenCart, WooCommerce).
